This one is short, sorry! <3

HANAHAKI DISEASE:

Hanahaki disease is a painful, slow illness that usually develops over months, if not years, and begins with coughing up a few petals, increasing in intensity and pain until the victim coughs up entire flowers, at which point the disease has reached its final stages. If left untreated, the disease is fatal.

Hanahaki disease is a fictional disease that causes flowers to grow in the lungs and throat of someone who is suffering from unrequited love. The flowers can look different for different people.

In the fanfiction trope of Hanahaki disease, there are two ways to cure the disease: 

  • Reciprocated love

    If the person the sick person loves reciprocates their feelings, the flowers will disappear.

  • Surgery

    The flowers can be surgically removed from the lungs, but this will also remove the romantic feelings. (Meaning the person can never fall in love again.)

AESTHETIC AND GUIDE:

SONGS: (JUST THE ONES THAT GAVE ME LIKE A SORT OF INSPIRATION)

1) ILOMILO

2) RADIOHEAD

3) I MONSTER
